zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD维持极窄区间震荡，价格围绕1.15附近运行，短线多空拉锯明显，但整体仍保持在20日均线上方，结构呈弱势整理后逐步企稳迹象

技术指标方面，MACD数值维持小幅正值0.0036，动能偏多但强度有限，信号线缺失使交叉判断受限，SMA20位于1.14597形成短期支撑，整体动能偏中性略多

支撑位关注1.1490附近低点结构，若跌破可能回测1.145区域；阻力位集中在1.1517及前高1.152附近，突破需放量确认

交易策略建议短线以区间交易为主，在1.1490附近分批低吸，上方1.1517附近逐步止盈，若放量突破则顺势跟多，否则谨慎追涨控制仓位

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation structure after a modest recovery, with price action hovering near the upper boundary of its recent range. The market bias remains mildly bullish as price holds above the 20-period simple moving average, suggesting short-term demand is still intact. However, momentum appears limited, indicating traders are awaiting a decisive breakout or rejection near current levels around 1.151.

Momentum indicators show a slightly constructive but weakly confirmed bullish signal. MACD is marginally positive at 0.0036, indicating early upward pressure, though the absence of a signal line value limits confirmation strength. Price trading above the 20-SMA at 1.14597 reinforces short-term support. With RSI unavailable, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed, leaving trend confirmation primarily dependent on price structure and moving average behavior.

Immediate resistance is defined by the recent high at 1.15168, where price has repeatedly stalled, suggesting liquidity concentration and potential selling pressure. A sustained break above this level could open the way toward short-term continuation. On the downside, initial support sits at the 20-SMA near 1.14597, followed closely by the session low at 1.14906 acting as intraday pivot support within the current consolidation range.

Trading conditions favor short-term range strategies rather than directional positioning due to compressed volatility. Scalpers may consider buying near the 20-SMA support with tight risk controls, targeting a retest of resistance at 1.15168. Alternatively, breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above resistance before entering long positions. Protective stops should remain tight below 1.1459 to mitigate false breakdown risks in this low-momentum environment.
